posts.text: AUM Book - How the clean up happened in last 5 years Risk recognition: Chairman says: Middle East tensions, energy disruptions, higher input costs, liquidity tightening and credit risks remain concerns. CEO says: Global events since March raise an important question mark on where credit costs might head in FY27. We are not sure credit quality remains this benign. Mgmt guiding 25% growth in FY27 & 28. Very ambitious Current: AUM = ₹1,01,230 Cr Target FY28: ₹1.5 lakh Cr Impact of AI: 300 engineers 200 AI scientists Lead to Disbursement per branch increased ₹66 Cr → ₹79 Cr ( despite increase in b…
